query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND TABLE_NAME = 'user_working_hours' 
AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('weeklyHoursMin', 'weeklyHoursMax', 'dailyHoursMin', 'dailyHoursMax')
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zdYySmWxto697z.f7331094e4e6 --database 8WaJog2pAVrGepmXoS2wYU --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND TABLE_NAME = 'user_working_hours' 
AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('weeklyHoursMin', 'weeklyHoursMax', 'dailyHoursMin', 'dailyHoursMax')
